x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist features ship with each release. Running an outdated release means missing AI capabilities, security patches affecting Now Assist, and potential incompatibilities with Now Assist configurations.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Plan an upgrade to the latest Generally Available release (Zurich or newer). Now Assist capabilities expand with each release — staying current maximizes AI feature availability. Engage ServiceNow account team for upgrade planning assistance.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_83f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c15
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Now Assist features ship with each release. Running an outdated release means missing AI capabilities, security patches affecting Now Assist, and potential incompatibilities with Now Assist configurations.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Instance Upgrade Currency</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // Find the most recent platform upgrade (filter for glide- prefix = platform release)
    var gr = new GlideRecord('sys_upgrade_history');
    gr.addQuery('to_version', 'STARTSWITH', 'glide-');
    gr.orderByDesc('sys_created_on');
    gr.setLimit(1);
    gr.query();

    if (!gr.next()) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: 'No platform upgrade history found',
            finding: 'No platform upgrade history found. Cannot determine instance release currency for Now Assist compatibility.'
        };
    }

    var version = gr.getValue('to_version') || '';
    var vLower = version.toLowerCase();
    var actualValue = 'Version: ' + version;

    // Now Assist full capability: Zurich and newer
    // Now Assist partial: Xanadu, Washington, Vancouver
    // Now Assist not supported: Utah and older
    var isCurrentGen = vLower.indexOf('zurich') > -1 || vLower.indexOf('yokohama') > -1 ||
                       vLower.indexOf('2025') > -1 || vLower.indexOf('2026') > -1;
    var isPreviousGen = vLower.indexOf('xanadu') > -1 || vLower.indexOf('washington') > -1 ||
                        vLower.indexOf('vancouver') > -1;

    if (isCurrentGen) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Instance is on a current-generation release (' + version.split('__')[0] + '). Full Now Assist and AI Agent capabilities are available.'
        };
    } else if (isPreviousGen) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Instance is on a previous-generation release (' + version.split('__')[0] + '). Some Now Assist features may be unavailable. Plan upgrade to Zurich or later for full AI capability.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Instance may be on an older release (' + version.split('__')[0] + '). Now Assist requires Xanadu or newer — upgrade is required before AI capabilities can be fully enabled.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>PLATFORM</module><number>CHK0000486</number><order>70</order><remediation_guidance>Plan an upgrade to the latest Generally Available release (Zurich or newer). Now Assist capabilities expand with each release — staying current maximizes AI feature availability. Engage ServiceNow account team for upgrade planning assistance.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>83f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c15</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Instance Upgrade Currency</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_83f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c15</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
